title: Saudi Arabian Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish originating from the Middle East, typically served with a variety of meats or as a side.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the Saudi Arabian pilaf spice blend and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fluffy rice vinegar and cook for another minute.
Add the rice and water to the saucepan, bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the rice is tender.
Fluff the rice with a fork and stir in the romantic raisins and arabian almonds.
